name: Brie with Roasted Garlic
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds Brie cheese, four 4-1/2 oz wheels
1/2 cup pitted and quartered olives (Greek or ripe)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the whole garlic bulbs in a heavy saucepan with olive oil. Cook and stir over medium heat for 5 minutes. Cover and reduce heat to medium-low for 15 minutes, or until the garlic is soft. Remove the garlic from the oil and drain on paper towels; cool.
2. Carefully slice the thin rind off one of the flat sides of each Brie wheel. Place them on a baking sheet, cut side up. Divide the roasted garlic cloves and gently press them into fans atop each Brie wheel. Arrange the garlic fans and olives on top of the Brie.
3. Bake uncovered in a 400°F oven for 10 to 12 minutes, or until the Brie is warm and slightly softened. Sprinkle with parsley.
4. Transfer the Brie to a plate and serve with apple wedges or bread. Makes 16 servings.
To make ahead: Wrap the Brie wheels in plastic wrap and chill up to 3 days. Before serving, heat through as directed.
